def positive_gzip_open_per_chunk():
    rule_id = "gzip_open_per_chunk"
    family = "hot_path_ext"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "gzip open/create calls are repeated per chunk instead of per stream."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
